calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Lorece C. Lundy, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sandra Hubbard.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- 14 Days Notice------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration for Proof of Service------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 24 Blythdale Ave., San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Pas-due Rent $2,892.00
Holdover Damages $570.33
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $3,662.33
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CINDY LEE FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SANDRA HUBBARD

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY TRIAL REMAINS

COMMISSIONER: SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
